ab: Sndamac su balay, mbari su manu ka isu?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Mpbari ku kingal mmahan pngerah.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: Sndamac su balay, mpbari su manu?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Mari ku kingal bunuh ka yaku.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: Mari ku kopu, niqan briyan ka yamu hini hu?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: Niqan, piya ka briyun su?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: Niqan namu pbari bingro hu?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: Uka, ini nami pbari bingro.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: Mari ku buwax payay.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: Piya lubuy ka briyun su?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: Bqani ku turu lubuy.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: Mbari ku bunga.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: Wada qdun pbari ka bunga da.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: Mari ku dha rusuq abura.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: Msngari nami kingal balay rusuq da.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: Hay ku dmayaw mari balung.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: Khnu toting ka briyun su?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: Khnu cnhdilan toting ka briyun su balung?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: Mbari ku dha toting.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: Mbari ku dha bnkiyan neygi.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: Msngari turu bnkiyan ka hini, sbuway misu kana da!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: Khnu hbangan briyan ka kingal lubuy buwax payay ni?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: Kingal lubuy u dha kbkuy klabuy.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: Kana balay u mpusal kingal krtan pila, ana mpusal krtan pila da baka da.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: Mhuway su balay.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: Hini pa mngari kmxalan rima krtan pila.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Mpbari ku tikuh dungan, pttuku kbkuy klabuy.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: Kana balay u rima kbkuy klabuy mi maxal krtan pila.
en: A:All $510.

ab: Ngali ku smpu rima kbkuy klabuy haw?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: Scuqi mkray ka ni da, malu sbari mhnuk hari hu?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: Naqah, mhnuk balay ka ni da.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: Mangal ku kingal lnbuwan hlama pingkan ni.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: Mturul krtan pila ka hlama ni, mbari su manu nina hu?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
